emails.subject: Re: Approval is Overdue: Access Request for paul.d.thomas@enron.com
emails.subject_base: Approval is Overdue: Access Request for paul.d.thomas@enron.com
emails.body: Re: Approval is Overdue: Access Request for paul.d.thomas@enron.com The system will not allow me to view this request, saying that it has been assigned to you. I have left a message with the admin who originated these requests. If I don't hear back from her today, I think we should just deny all of them. I earlier sent emails to the individuals named asking what data they needed to access and NONE of them responded. --Stinson Vince J Kaminski 01/31/2001 07:45 AM
